title: Lim tree
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Lim trees''' were native to the [[Yuuzhan'tar|original Yuuzhan'tar]], and were stored in the [[Qang qahsa]]. They had fine silver limbs that actively searched for food. Other than asthetics, they had no value.

A close relative of the lim tree grew on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]], a point which led [[Nen Yim]] to consider the planet's true origins.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''
